benefits-subtitle: Enjoy a range of state-of-the-art accommodation facilities and services during your stay, including fitness amenities, exclusive events, a wellness center, and more.
crypto-a-1: Upon agreeing to the Club by-laws, and paying the fees, Members of the Club receive the following assets :
crypto-a-4: These Assets will be tokenised and Airdropped directly to their (metamask) wallet as NFT tokens If you prefer, our Members-Relations service can manage your wallet/ tokens for you, at no extra cost.
crypto-b: Nite, our dedicated marketplace platform, allows Members to sell their tokenised assets (membership or accommodation rights) if they wish to move on... or extend their stay
crypto-c-1: Accomodation rights are tokenised, & exchangeable on the Marketplace :
crypto-c-2: Each month, we airdrop to our Members’ wallets (up to date with their dues) on a pro-rata basis :
crypto-d: Access to exclusive services such as SPA, boat trips, sailing school, mountain biking circuit, and special events.
eco-subtitle: We're creating a more sustainable way to see the world - from the trees planted when you book, to the eco-friendly products in your kitchen.
extra-description-1: Immerse yourself in the authenticity of our Kasbah Pool accommodations, offering private bedrooms, traditional bathrooms, and an exclusive private pool for a serene escape.
extra-description-2: Experience genuine comfort in our VIP Villas, featuring en suite bedrooms, well-equipped kitchens, and spacious living areas, all designed with an authentic touch.
extra-description-3: Perfect for families or groups, our 3-bedroom villas provide private bedrooms, multiple bathrooms, a large kitchen, and ample living space, all reflecting authentic design and comfort.
hero-subtitle: Joining Itri Living is an amazing opportunity available only to our members. Secure your place among a privileged and limited number of individuals who value exceptional moments, a sense of community, and a love for our planet.
kasbah-subtitle: A place to call your own. Perfect for couples, friends, or solo travellers.
